notes: The dominant pattern for emonyms-as-liquids (382/750 = 51% in amor).

Pouring/spilling the emonym.

seed_lemmas_es: inundado por, empapado de, ahogado en, inundar de, inundar con, inundarse de, inundarse en
notes: Experiencer as oblique recipient of the liquid. Active-voice forms (`inundar de`, `se inundó de`) listed alongside the canonical past-participle ones — both surface in the legacy data under the instrumental column.

notes: Working the thread.
Thread does itself. "Se entrelazan miedos y obsesiones" is the productive form in legacy data.
Thread ties/binds something.

seed_lemmas_es: atado con, tejido con, pender de

notes: Lat. tensus. `retorcido` is the past-participle attributive of `retorcer` (in verbal-objective).

seed_lemmas_es: hilo de, madeja de, carrete de, ovillo de

notes: rodar la pelota, envolver un plato.

seed_lemmas_es: girar en torno a, girar alrededor de, girar, rodar, envolver
notes: Emonym revolves. Compound forms listed first so the detector picks the prepositional form when it is present. `envolver` reflects the legacy source's tagging of "el miedo envuelve a X" as intransitive (the emonym as enveloping agent), even though syntactically transitive — preserve source intent.
Emonym wraps the experiencer.

seed_lemmas_es: envuelto en, envuelto entre, envuelto de, envolver en, envolver de
notes: Past-participle and active-voice variants both surface under the instrumental column.

seed_lemmas_es: bola de, círculo de, esfera de
notes: círculo vicioso de tristeza is recurrent.
S atraviesa O; "el miedo penetra nuestro entorno" without preposition; "el miedo se clava en…" reflexive variant.
S penetra en O. Bare form kept for compound-fallback when "en" is absent.
Clavar/hincar el miedo en alguien.

seed_lemmas_es: atravesado por, clavado por, atravesar por, clavado en
notes: clavado en surfaces alongside "clavado por" in legacy data; "atravesar por" appears in causative infinitive frames ("dejarse atravesar por…").
Source headers spell "penentrante" — preserved only in source_file.

seed_lemmas_es: estar en, encontrarse en, vivir en, existir en, aparecer en, permanecer en, sumirse en, dentro de
notes: algo está / vive en el recipiente — being inside. "dentro de" covers preposition-only locatives ("dentro de este miedo aparece…"); "sumirse en" covers immersion-state ("sumidas en el temor").

Motion out of the container — distinct from -into.
